summary: Subscription Plans Modal feature tested successfully. All requested features are working: Trial Expired banner with 'Upgrade' button (not 'Upgrade Before Expiry'), locked pages with lock icons, SubscriptionPlansModal with 3 plans (Basic, Pro, Pro+), 1 Month/6 Months billing toggle, savings percentage display, plan badges (Most Popular, Best Value), and Choose [Plan] buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: SubscriptionPlansModal component correctly fetches plans from /api/resources/plans
Billing toggle correctly switches between one_month and six_month pricing
Savings percentage calculated and displayed for 6-month billing
Plan badges (Most Popular, Best Value) correctly assigned to Pro and Pro+ plans
showUpgradeModal function properly exposed via DashboardContext
Locked pages (Courses, Drills, Peer Practice, Coaching) show lock icons and trigger modal
Trial Expired banner shows 'Upgrade' button (not 'Upgrade Before Expiry') as requested
seed_data_creation: Used existing expired trial user (expired@gradnext.com) with trial_status.is_expired=true
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription Plans Modal feature fully tested. Modal opens from: 1) Upgrade button in Trial Expired banner, 2) View Plans button in sidebar, 3) Navigating to locked pages (Courses, Drills, etc.). Plans API returns pricing.one_month and pricing.six_month fields. Toggle switches between monthly and 6-month billing with savings percentage displayed.

trial_expired_banner.details: Shows 'Trial Expired' with 'Upgrade' button (not 'Upgrade Before Expiry')

locked_pages_with_icons.details: Courses, Case Drills, Peer Practice, Coaching show lock icons in sidebar

subscription_plans_modal.details: Opens with 3 plans: Basic Plan (₹499/mo), Pro Plan (₹699/mo), Pro+ (₹1,299/mo)

billing_toggle.details: 1 Month / 6 Months toggle at top of modal

pricing_switch.details: Toggle switches pricing: Basic ₹499→₹399, Pro ₹699→₹599, Pro+ ₹1,299→₹999

savings_percentage.details: 6-month billing shows 'Save X% vs monthly' and 'Save up to 30%' badge

plan_features_list.details: Each plan shows correct features list with checkmarks

plan_badges.details: Pro Plan has 'Most Popular' badge, Pro+ has 'Best Value' badge

choose_plan_buttons.details: 'Choose Basic Plan', 'Choose Pro Plan', 'Choose Pro+' buttons are clickable

view_plans_button.details: View Plans button in sidebar opens the same modal

locked_page_upgrade.details: Navigating to locked Courses page auto-opens the subscription modal

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use real data from /api/resources/plans endpoint
